text:
It was a chilly morning. I made tea to warm myself.

The teapot bubbled away. Once it was ready, I added sugar. It crystallized atop the water. Brilliant.

I drank my tea. It was rich and comforting.

Later, I ventured outside to meet my friend. As we walked, she shared an old tale. I listened intently. Her words felt like whispers.

That evening, I scribbled down a few notes. I’d remember what she told me.

I dreamt about a garden under a spell. Everything bloomed. I walked through it. Memories blossomed. I smiled.

I woke up with a story.
